Link text is very long (165 characters)

<a class="museum-cover" href="https://bymuseet.no/museum/hakonshallen/"> <div class="image-container"> <div class="image-holder rocket-lazyload" data-bg="https://bymuseet.no/wp-content/uploads/2021/06
Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a href="https://www.facebook.com/bymuseet"> <svg fill="none" height="13" viewbox="0 0 7 13" width="7" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="M4.20974 12.858V6.42777H5.9863L6.22173 4.21187H4.209
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a href="https://www.instagram.com/bymuseetibergen/"> <svg fill="none" height="16" viewbox="0 0 17 16" width="17" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="M8.27497 -0.000488281C10.4505 -0.00048828
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://mementor.no/wordpress-plugins/tekst-til-tale/" rel="noopener" target="_blank"><strong>Tekst til Tale for WordPress utvidelse</strong></a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://try.elevenlabs.io/mementor" rel="noopener" target="_blank"><strong>ElevenLabs</strong></a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'here'

<a href="#">here</a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')

1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (13 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)

<iframe allowfullscreen="" height="100%" loading="lazy" src="https://goo.gl/maps/EWBk1tQVqGiuB6zM7" style="border:0;" width="100%"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

aria-labelledby references non-existent ID: 'galleryModalLabel'

<div aria-hidden="true" aria-labelledby="galleryModalLabel" class="modal fade" data-bs-keyboard="false" id="galleryModal" tabindex="-1"> <div class="modal-dialog modal-xl"> <div class="modal-content">
Ensure the referenced ID exists on the page

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="section-title"> Galleri </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (11 avvik)

Link text is not descriptive: 'here'

<a href="#">here</a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://mementor.no/wordpress-plugins/tekst-til-tale/" rel="noopener" target="_blank"><strong>Tekst til Tale for WordPress utvidelse</strong></a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://try.elevenlabs.io/mementor" rel="noopener" target="_blank"><strong>ElevenLabs</strong></a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

MODERATE

Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
